levels.name: IRON GATE
levels.desc: A pair of ferrets block the iron gate. One of them snorts. 'Hah — a fox? On the Path of the Sumurai? Go home, kit.'
levels.clear_desc: The ferrets go quiet. One of them laughs despite himself — 'Not bad, fox.' Watching them weave and sidestep, something clicks. Quick Steps. You're going to need that.

levels.name: BAMBOO TRAIL
levels.desc: Boars and rabbits hold the trail. The boars are slow — but the rabbits won't stay still long enough to hit.
levels.defeat_tip: Rabbits are extremely evasive. Don't waste heavy strikes on them — wait for your opening.
levels.clear_desc: The trail is yours. The rabbits were slippery, but you found the gaps. You're starting to understand — speed isn't just about hitting first.

levels.name: FOX DEN
levels.desc: Five rabbits have made themselves at home in the old fox den. They see you coming — and not one of them runs.
levels.defeat_tip: The rabbits move as a pack — they always strike at the 3rd turn, first action. Let them think they have you. Then make it count.
levels.clear_desc: Five against one, and not one of them ran. When the last rabbit dropped, you heard slow clapping from the tree line. A turtle steps out of the shadows, arms folded. 'You have skill, fox,' he says. 'Let me show you something.'

levels.name: SILENT SHRINE
levels.desc: Rest at the shrine of the old blade masters.
levels.defeat_tip: Turtles Are Scary, make sure you take them down! Otters Wave Slash prevent you from evading!
levels.clear_desc: The shrine stands quiet. The blade masters ask nothing of you — only that you are still standing. Rest here. The path ahead will not be gentle.

levels.name: 2 Turtles and a Rabbit
levels.desc: To Achieve Power, you must defeat the 2 turtle master, and a rabbit for some reason
levels.defeat_tip: The turtle uses phase shifts — watch for the stance change and adjust your target.
levels.clear_desc: The Turtles are impressed by your skill, and wish you luck on your journey to becoming a great sumurai!

levels.name: TURTLE TEST
levels.desc: The Turtles will teach the value of patient, and breath
levels.defeat_tip: Still Wind. Generates Battle Spirit. One at the start, and for other each non-action taken. But it can be broken early! Slice Them!
levels.clear_desc: You Earn The Turtle's Respect, and taught you the value of breathing harmony!
